zh.lifeSummary: 當William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby於大約1300年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby25歲，母親Lucia de Thwenge22歲。他和Elizabeth Botetourt至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1335年11月2日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.Corby, Northamptonshire, England: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾可比
zh-hans.Scampston, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯坎普斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby于大约1300年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby25岁，母亲Lucia de Thwenge22岁。他和Elizabeth Botetourt至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1335年11月2日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Latimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a Latinist, a clerk who wrote documents in Latin, from Anglo-Norman French latinier, latim(m)ier. Latin was more or less the universal language of official documents in the Middle Ages, displaced only gradually by the vernacular – in England, by Anglo-Norman French at first, and eventually by English.

variants.name: Latner
meanings: English: occupational name for a worker in or maker of latten or brass, from Middle English latoun ‘brass’ (Old French laton). This name may sometimes have been confused with Latimer .
Altered form of German   Lattner   or   Lettner  .

variants.name: Lattner
meanings: German: occupational name for a carpenter who prepared or used laths or slats, from Middle High German latte ‘slat, lath’ + -n (plural suffix) + the agent suffix -er.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby was born about 1300, in Yorkshire, England, his father, William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby, was 25 and his mother, Lucia de Thwenge, was 22. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Botetourt. He died before 2 November 1335, in his hometown, and was buried in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby est né environ 1300, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lucia de Thwenge, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Botetourt. Il est décédé avant 2 novembre 1335, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby um 1300 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby 25 und seine Mutter Lucia de Thwenge 22. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Botetourt mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 2. November 1335 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby è nato il circa 1300 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Lucia de Thwenge, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Botetourt. Morì prima del 2 novembre 1335, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corbyが約1300年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corbyは25歳，母Lucia de Thwengeは22歳であった。彼はElizabeth Botetourtとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1335年11月2日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby(이)가 대략 1300년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucia de Thwenge(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Botetourt(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1335년 11월 2일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1300–shortly before 2 November 133: ойролцоогоор 1300 он–1335 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 2–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lucia de Thwenge, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Elizabeth Botetourt. Ele faleceu antes 2 de novembro de 1335, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby родился около 1300 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia de Thwenge, 22. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Botetourt. Он умер перед 2 ноябрь 1335 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности еркшир, Англия.

sm.about 1300–shortly before 2 November 133: e tusa o le 1300–a'e le'I oo le 2 Novema 1335

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Latimer 3rd Baron Latimer of Corby nació aproximadamente 1300, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Latimer 2nd Baron Latimer of Corby, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Lucia de Thwenge, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Elizabeth Botetourt. Murió antes de 2 de noviembre de 1335, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
